overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Spider-Man walking through a nighttime urban environment resembling New York City. The character navigates sidewalks and crosswalks past pedestrians, parked cars, and illuminated storefronts with autumn foliage visible on the streets.

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along the right sidewalk, weaving past pedestrians and observing the street

notable_agents.action: man in business suit standing against the brick building wall
yellow taxi cab driving down the street alongside the sidewalk

entered.detail: red brick building with closed metal storefront shutters and large windows
tall modern office building with illuminated windows rising in the background
deciduous trees with orange and brown autumn leaves lining the street
row of parked vehicles along the street curb including sedans and SUVs
tall street lamps casting pools of warm light on the pavement

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a city sidewalk at night, passing a brick building with closed storefronts on the left. The street is lined with autumn trees and parked cars, while yellow taxis drive by on the right. Pedestrians walk in both directions under the glow of streetlights.

events.description: Spider-Man steps off the sidewalk curb and enters the marked crosswalk to cross the street
a red emergency vehicle is visible parked on the left side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street via the zebra crosswalk, moving from the right sidewalk to the left side of the street

notable_agents.action: red emergency vehicle parked at the intersection with lights visible

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing lines marking the pedestrian path across the asphalt
large red truck or ambulance parked on the street near the intersection
distant view down the avenue with tall skyscrapers forming an urban canyon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as Spider-Man crosses the street. White crosswalk lines mark the path across the asphalt, while a red emergency vehicle sits parked to the left. The view down the avenue reveals a canyon of tall illuminated skyscrapers in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with benches and street furniture

events.description: steps onto the opposite sidewalk with decorative stone paving after completing the street crossing

agents.ego_description: walking along the left sidewalk past benches and newspaper stands, approaching the next intersection

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a wooden bench outside the stone building

entered.detail: decorative patterned stone tiles covering the walking surface
red newspaper vending machine on the sidewalk near the corner
wooden benches with people sitting along the building facade
light-colored stone building with large illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man continues along the left sidewalk which features decorative stone paving. A red newspaper stand sits near the corner while people occupy benches outside a stone building. The glass office tower that was on the right is now visible on the left as the camera progresses down the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: restaurant front with outdoor dining patio

events.description: approaches the Elitehosen restaurant with illuminated signage and outdoor seating area
crosses another street intersection marked with white crosswalk lines

agents.ego_description: walking past the restaurant patio with outdoor diners, then crossing the next street intersection

entered.detail: restaurant with blue signage reading Elitehosen, warm string lights, and outdoor patio seating with tables and chairs
historic building with arched windows and doorways across the street
large wooden planters with flowers flanking the restaurant entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene features the Elitehosen restaurant on the right with its illuminated blue signage, string lights, and outdoor patio where patrons sit at tables. Spider-Man walks past the flower planters and outdoor seating before crossing another intersection marked with white crosswalk lines, with an arched historic building visible across the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nighttime city street that transitions from a quiet sidewalk into a bustling urban intersection and past illuminated storefronts. It begins with Spider-Man walking along a brick building lined with autumn trees and parked cars, while yellow taxis stream past on the right. As he reaches a wide intersection, the view expands to reveal a canyon of glowing skyscrapers in the distance while he crosses the asphalt over white crosswalk lines. The scene then shifts toward a decorative stone sidewalk featuring a red newspaper stand and people resting on benches, with a glass office tower looming overhead. Finally, the camera glides past the blue signage and string lights of the Elitehosen restaurant's outdoor patio before crossing another intersection toward a historic arched building.
